app.title: Baggage X-Ray Threat Detection
app.subtitle: Saudi Ports — AI assistant for security officers
app.tagline: Upload an X-ray image and let AI help you spot threats.

upload.hint: Supported: JPG, PNG, WebP — max 10 MB
upload.error_size: Image exceeds the maximum size (10 MB)
upload.error_network: Could not reach the API. Make sure it's running.

results.title: Analysis result
results.no_detections: No threats detected in this image.
results.no_detections_hint: This does not mean the bag is definitively safe — the AI is an assistant; the officer makes the final call.
